message:
feat(core): expand btrfs compressed extent read path and update lockfile

Extend btrfs_read_file to handle compressed Regular extents (not just
Inline) by reading the compressed on-disk data and decompressing via
btrfs_decompress(). Use ram_bytes from the extent record as the
uncompressed target size. Refine offset/length calculations for
compressed extent slicing.

Update Cargo.lock with flate2 dependency tree.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
